column2: The Pit Grandstand at the Singapore Grand Prix provides premium, tiered seating directly opposite the Formula 1 team garages and start/finish straight in Zone 1. It offers an exceptional, high-octane view of the grid lineup, race start, pit stop strategies, and the post-race fireworks display and trophy presentation.

The Padang Grandstand is a prime, high-energy Zone 4 location at the Singapore Formula 1 Grand Prix on St Andrew's Road, offering views of cars exiting Turn 9 and approaching the Turn 10 chicane at speeds up to 275 km/h. Situated on the driver's left, it offers a scenic, historic backdrop of the National Gallery, close proximity to the main Padang Stage concerts, and excellent access to food and entertainment.
